🚀 Big Launches.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
🚀 Big Launches.summary: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot, providing stronger AI capabilities across various applications.

🚀 Big Launches.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
🚀 Big Launches.summary: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.

🚀 Big Launches.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
🚀 Big Launches.summary: OpenAI's latest family of models promises improvements across a range of areas, including cybersecurity.

🚀 Big Launches.title: Meta enters the crowded AI coding battle with Muse Spark 1.1
🚀 Big Launches.summary: Meta's pitch to users is Spark's ability to handle large agentic workloads, fix bugs, and help with large code migrations.

🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.title: Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI
🛠️ Builder's Toolbox.summary: Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI, adding a label to ads that were created or edited using AI.

🎯 Interview Edge.title: Microsoft's patch Tuesdays are about to get bigger
🎯 Interview Edge.summary: Microsoft is using AI to identify potential issues earlier, resulting in a higher volume of security updates included in each security release.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: New York Times says OpenAI hid evidence in ChatGPT copyright trial
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: The New York Times claims that OpenAI hid tools and datasets that could identify copyrighted journalism in ChatGPT outputs.

⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Microsoft's carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Microsoft's carbon emissions increased 25 percent in 2025, totaling 34 million metric tons without select interventions.

🔮 On the Horizon.title: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.6 after government greenlight — and announces 'ChatGPT Work'
🔮 On the Horizon.summary: OpenAI has received the Trump administration's greenlight for a public rollout of GPT-5.6 and announced ChatGPT Work, an agent that can take action across your apps and files.

tool_of_day.title: Google's My Ad Center
tool_of_day.summary: Google's My Ad Center now includes a label to indicate if an ad was created or edited using AI.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more transparency and accountability, with companies like Google and Microsoft incorporating AI-generated labels and disclosures into their products and services.
